title: Simple Ender Backpack
description: Portable ender storage with Accessories support
body:
# Simple Ender Backpack

This mod adds an Ender Backpack which acts as a portable ender chest. It's crafted by surrounding an ender chest with leather, and can be opened by using it as an item or having it anywhere in the inventory and pressing B (default keybind, configurable). If [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) is installed, the backpack can also be equipped in the Back slot.

Fabric version requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

NeoForge version has no dependencies.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe9635334f39daff819853d83aa59daf7b9f3bc9.png)
